title: Netflix's New 8-Part Western Is Already Worth Watching Ahead Of Season 2
summary: Netflix's new 8-part Western series is so good that it has already been renewed for season 2 ahead of its worldwide premiere this Thursday, July 9.

fullArticle:
Netflix's new 8-part Western series is so good that it has already been renewed for a second season ahead of its worldwide premiere this Thursday, July 9. Based on a famous classic novel, this new Netflix series follows a family that lives and works in Midwestern America during the late 1800s and is set to bring ot life the timeless tale of family and survival like never before. Because of its iconic source material and high production value, it has been named one of ScreenRant's very best shows to watch on Netflix this week.
